title: rubus lamprothrix
intro: Rubus lamprothrix, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus lamprothrix include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus lamprothrix include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make jams, jellies, and other edible products.
